# makeAsyncIterator()

**Instance Method**

Creates the asynchronous iterator that produces results from this asynchronous sequence.

## Declaration

```swift
func makeAsyncIterator() -> ManagedAppLibrary.ManagedApps.AsyncIterator
```

## Obtaining managed apps

- **ManagedAppLibrary.ManagedApps.AsyncIterator**: The iterator for managed apps.
- **ManagedAppLibrary.ManagedApps.Element**: The type of element this asynchronous sequence produces.

items.description: The type of element this asynchronous sequence produces.
